goal: Research Tesla and produce a concise overview: products, moat, risks, near-term outlook.
Summarize the key competitors of Nvidia and compare differentiation.
Analyze reasons for a hypothetical e-commerce revenue drop in Q4 and propose next steps.
Create a go-to-market plan for launching a new AI note-taking app in the US SMB segment.
Assess the business impact of a 10% cloud infrastructure cost increase and suggest mitigation options.
Compare three strategies to improve retention for a subscription video platform and recommend one.
Build a risk register for expanding an online education product into Southeast Asia.
Investigate why conversion dropped after a checkout redesign and propose an experiment roadmap.
Evaluate whether a B2B SaaS startup should prioritize enterprise or mid-market for next-quarter growth.
Draft an analysis plan to diagnose customer support backlog growth and improve SLA compliance.
